title: nata` #5193
definition:
1) to plant, fasten, fix, establish
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to plant
        1a2) to plant, establish (fig.)
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be planted
        1b2) to be established (fig.)
